content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 FairGambling: Casino Management & Operations Anywhere in the World Customer Support Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://fairgambling.com">https://fairgambling.com</a> </p> <h1>Casino Management &amp; Operations</h1><p></p><p><strong>About us – FairGambling</strong> We're a fast-growing platform in the online gaming space. Not a casino ourselves, but the layer on top of it: we review, compare, and analyze operators across the industry, with transparency as the whole point. A lot of what we cover happens onchain, so we don't take operator numbers at face value – we verify them. Player reviews are checked against real on-platform activity, not just star ratings. The goal is simple: give players the honest picture the industry usually doesn't.</p><p><strong>The role</strong> This is a broad, hands-on role for people who really know the iGaming industry. The title is intentionally open: we have multiple areas to cover and we'd rather meet strong industry people first and place them where they fit best. Junior and ambitious people are very welcome – we're happy to grow the right person into it.</p><p><strong>What you'll do:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Coordinate casino-related content and reviews, working closely with writers and researchers</p></li><li><p>Own our operator database – keep it accurate, current, and well-organized</p></li><li><p>Handle ongoing operations, updates, and escalations</p></li><li><p>Manage affiliate relationships with casino operators</p></li><li><p>Drive day-to-day ops and process improvements, coordinate publishing schedules, keep the team moving</p></li><li><p>Cover user support: handle inquiries, help users navigate disputes with casinos, answer questions about our reviews, and improve support processes</p></li></ul><p><strong>What we're looking for:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Solid background in iGaming – this is the part that matters most</p></li><li><p>Deep understanding of wagering, bonuses, and what separates good operators from bad actors</p></li><li><p>Coordination and ops mindset – you keep things moving and don't let them slip</p></li><li><p>Strong communication; comfortable working independently</p></li><li><p>Real industry experience prioritized over a perfect title match – juniors welcome</p></li></ul><p><strong>To apply, please include:</strong></p><ol><li><p>Your background in the iGaming industry and where you've worked</p></li><li><p>One operator problem or dispute you'd know how to handle, and how</p></li><li><p>Your availability and what part of this role fits you best</p></li></ol> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/fairgambling-casino-management-operations">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/fairgambling-casino-management-operations</a></p> Mon, 18 May 2026 12:16:32 +0000 Wed, 17 Jun 2026 12:16:32 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/fairgambling-casino-management-operations https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/fairgambling-casino-management-operations FairGambling: Blockchain Engineer & Researcher Anywhere in the World Back-End Programming Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://fairgambling.com">https://fairgambling.com</a> </p> <h1><strong>Blockchain Engineer / Analyst (Remote, Full-time or Contract)</strong></h1><p><strong>About us – FairGambling</strong> We're a fast-growing platform in the online gaming space. Not a casino ourselves, but the layer on top of it: we review, compare, and analyze operators across the industry, with transparency as the whole point. A lot of what we cover happens onchain, so we don't take operator numbers at face value – we verify them. Player reviews are checked against real on-platform activity, not just star ratings. The goal is simple: give players the honest picture the industry usually doesn't.</p><p><strong>The role</strong> A lot of what we verify lives onchain. We're hiring someone who's comfortable there – building tooling, tracking transactions across chains, and following contracts to surface what operators don't say themselves.</p><p><strong>What you'll do:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Build and maintain trackers, dashboards, and scripts</p></li><li><p>Monitor multiple chains, track transactions, and follow contracts onchain</p></li><li><p>Investigate transaction flows and surface insights for the research and content team</p></li><li><p>Follow trails through data – the work is genuinely investigative</p></li></ul><p><strong>What we're looking for:</strong></p><ul><li><p>Experience with trackers, dashboards, and scripts; smart contracts and transaction flows a strong plus</p></li><li><p>Multi-chain experience ideally (EVM, Solana, BSC, TRON, etc.)</p></li><li><p>Hands-on with blockchain explorers and analytics tools</p></li><li><p>Background in a crypto product (exchange, DeFi) is a big plus</p></li><li><p>Investigative mindset – you enjoy digging through data and following trails</p></li></ul><p><strong>To apply, please include:</strong></p><ol><li><p>Onchain tools, trackers, or investigations you've worked on (links / addresses welcome)</p></li><li><p>Your favorite analytics tool and something you've built or found with it</p></li><li><p>Your availability and preferred setup (full-time or contract)</p></li></ol> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/fairgambling-blockchain-engineer-researcher">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/fairgambling-blockchain-engineer-researcher</a></p> Mon, 18 May 2026 12:15:53 +0000 Wed, 17 Jun 2026 12:15:53 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/fairgambling-blockchain-engineer-researcher https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/fairgambling-blockchain-engineer-researcher Chief Rebel: Full Stack Engineer (AI-Forward) Anywhere in the World Texas Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5194/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Austin,TX <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://thechiefrebel.com/">https://thechiefrebel.com/</a> </p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><strong>Why This Role Matters</strong></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]">The small business market is massive and almost entirely untouched by modern technology. We're building the platform that changes that.
